tagline: Burbank's Most Trusted Auto Repair Shop

hero.heading: Your Car Deserves the Best
hero.subheading: Family-owned auto repair in Burbank with a perfect 5-star rating. Honest service, expert technicians, fair prices — every time.

about.heading: Honest Auto Repair You Can Count On
paragraphs: A & R Auto Repair has been a cornerstone of the Burbank automotive community for over two decades. Our ASE-certified technicians combine old-school expertise with modern diagnostic technology to deliver repairs that are done right the first time.

We believe in transparent pricing with no hidden fees, clear explanations before any work begins, and treating every vehicle like our own. That philosophy has earned us a perfect 5.0 rating across 61 Google reviews — and the trust of families throughout Burbank and the surrounding area.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.description: Complete brake system service including pads, rotors, calipers, and brake fluid flush. We inspect every component to keep you safe on the road.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics
services.description: State-of-the-art computer diagnostics to identify check engine lights, misfires, and performance issues. Accurate diagnosis means no wasted money.

services.title: Oil Change & Lube
services.description: Conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic oil changes with a complimentary multi-point inspection on every visit.

services.title: Transmission Service
services.description: Fluid exchanges, filter replacements, and complete transmission overhauls. We handle both automatic and manual transmissions.

services.title: AC & Heating
services.description: Full climate control service from refrigerant recharges to compressor replacement. Stay comfortable year-round in Burbank's heat.

services.title: Suspension & Steering
services.description: Struts, shocks, ball joints, tie rods, and wheel alignments. If your ride is rough or your steering wanders, we'll fix it.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: Hands down the best auto shop in Burbank. They fixed my brakes quickly and the price was very fair. No upselling, just honest work.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: I've been coming here for three years and they never disappoint. They always explain what needs to be done and never push unnecessary repairs.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Found this place through a neighbor's recommendation and I'm so glad I did. They diagnosed an issue two other shops missed. True professionals.

reviews.name: Jennifer M.
reviews.text: Transparent pricing, fast turnaround, and genuinely friendly staff. My whole family brings their cars here now.

reviews.name: Carlos R.
reviews.text: They took care of my transmission problem at a fraction of what the dealer quoted. Quality work and they stand behind everything.

reviews.name: Angela W.
reviews.text: First time visiting and I was blown away by the level of service. They showed me exactly what was wrong before doing any work. Will definitely be back.

faq.question: Do I need an appointment for an oil change?
faq.answer: Walk-ins are welcome for oil changes, but scheduling ahead helps us serve you faster. Give us a call at (818) 848-8335 to reserve a time.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept cash, all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover), and debit cards. We also offer financing options for larger repairs.

faq.question: Do you provide warranty on repairs?
faq.answer: Yes. All parts and labor come with a 12-month / 12,000-mile warranty. We stand behind every repair we perform.

faq.question: How long does a brake job take?
faq.answer: Most standard brake pad and rotor replacements are completed within 1.5 to 2 hours. We'll give you an accurate time estimate before we begin.

faq.question: Can you work on foreign and domestic vehicles?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Our technicians are experienced with all makes and models — Honda, Toyota, Ford, BMW, Mercedes, and everything in between.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: A & R Auto Repair, 835 S Glenoaks Blvd, Burbank, CA 91502

seo.title: A & R Auto Repair | Trusted Auto Mechanic in Burbank, CA
seo.description: 5-star rated auto repair shop in Burbank, CA. Specializing in brake repair, engine diagnostics, oil changes, and full vehicle maintenance. Call (818) 848-8335.
